cases.prompt: If I have a 500K token codebase and my LLM has a 128K context window, how does Snipara help and what are the cost savings?
ground_truth_claims: Snipara selects a much smaller focused context
A 500K-token corpus is larger than a 128K context window
Lower input-token volume can reduce inference cost

cases.prompt: When should I use snipara_decompose vs snipara_context_query?
ground_truth_claims: snipara_context_query handles focused source retrieval
snipara_decompose breaks complex questions into sub-queries
decomposition can make dependencies and execution order explicit

cases.prompt: What search mode should I use for different types of queries?
ground_truth_claims: keyword search is useful for exact terms
semantic search uses conceptual similarity
hybrid search combines keyword and semantic signals

cases.prompt: Trace the full flow of an MCP request from a user's Claude Desktop to database query and back.
ground_truth_claims: the client calls a Snipara MCP tool
the hosted service authenticates and retrieves project context
ranked context returns to the client for answer synthesis

cases.prompt: What are all the authentication options available and how do they differ in security?
ground_truth_claims: API keys support non-interactive access
OAuth device flow supports user authentication
credentials must be stored outside source control

cases.prompt: How does token budget allocation work when using shared context collections?
ground_truth_claims: shared context receives a bounded portion of the token budget
project-local context uses the remaining budget
relevant sections are selected within the available budget

cases.prompt: How do I configure real-time collaborative editing in Snipara?
ground_truth_claims: the requested document-editing feature is not part of the documented product
the answer should state the evidence gap instead of inventing setup steps

cases.prompt: What happens when a user exceeds their query limit?
ground_truth_claims: the API returns a bounded error response
the response identifies the applicable usage limit
the client should not retry an exhausted monthly quota indefinitely

cases.prompt: What happens if no relevant documents are found for a query?
ground_truth_claims: the result can contain no relevant sections
the response preserves retrieval diagnostics
the assistant should acknowledge missing evidence

cases.prompt: How does the execute_python tool work in Snipara Sandbox?
ground_truth_claims: execute_python runs code in a selected execution environment
sessions can preserve REPL context
execution profiles bound time and resource use

cases.prompt: How do agent memories persist across sessions in Snipara?
ground_truth_claims: durable memories are stored explicitly
recall retrieves relevant reviewed memory
scope and lifecycle metadata bound memory reuse

cases.prompt: How do multi-agent swarms work in Snipara?
ground_truth_claims: agents coordinate through shared task and state surfaces
claims or leases reduce conflicting work
ownership and progress remain visible
